# Playbook Manifest

Machine-readable index of every playbook page. Source of truth = each page's YAML frontmatter; regenerate with `python3 scripts/build_manifest.py`.

- **tier** ŌĆö `baseline` (most repos should adopt) vs `optional` (context-specific pattern).
- **targets** ŌĆö files/dirs in a consumer repo this page governs (what to compare / where to apply).
- **detect** ŌĆö globs; if any matches a repo path the page is relevant (ŌĆö = always relevant for its scope/platform).
- **platform** ŌĆö restricts relevance to `github` or `gitlab` (any = no restriction).

## universal

| Tool | Tier | Summary | Targets | Detect | Platform | Page |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `conventional-commits` | baseline | Commit message format feeding release tooling | ŌĆö | ŌĆö | any | [universal/conventional-commits.md](universal/conventional-commits.md) |
| `dependabot` | baseline | GitHub-native dependency update PRs | `.github/dependabot.yml` | ŌĆö | `github` | [universal/dependabot.md](universal/dependabot.md) |
| `docs-gen` | optional | Generate README/CLAUDE/AGENTS from partials via a small Python script | `docs/src/`, `scripts/build_docs.py` | ŌĆö | any | [universal/docs-gen.md](universal/docs-gen.md) |
| `lefthook` | baseline | Git hooks with autofix + restage (stage_fixed) | `lefthook.yml` | ŌĆö | any | [universal/lefthook.md](universal/lefthook.md) |
| `mise` | baseline | Pinned per-project tool versions (node, python, uv, ...) | `mise.toml` | ŌĆö | any | [universal/mise.md](universal/mise.md) |
| `releases-github` | baseline | release-please: PR-driven versioning + changelog on GitHub | `release-please-config.json`, `.release-please-manifest.json`, `.github/workflows/release-please.yml` | ŌĆö | `github` | [universal/releases-github.md](universal/releases-github.md) |
| `releases-gitlab` | baseline | semantic-release: tag + changelog on GitLab | `.releaserc.json`, `.gitlab-ci.yml` | ŌĆö | `gitlab` | [universal/releases-gitlab.md](universal/releases-gitlab.md) |
| `renovate` | baseline | Platform-agnostic dependency update bot (required on GitLab) | `renovate.json` | ŌĆö | any | [universal/renovate.md](universal/renovate.md) |
| `security` | baseline | semgrep (SAST) + trivy fs/image, SARIF to GitHub Code Scanning | `.github/workflows/security.yml` | ŌĆö | `github` | [universal/security.md](universal/security.md) |

## python

| Tool | Tier | Summary | Targets | Detect | Platform | Page |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `mypy` | baseline | Static type checker, strict mode | `pyproject.toml` | `**/*.py` | any | [python/mypy.md](python/mypy.md) |
| `pytest` | baseline | pytest + pytest-cov config and coverage gating | `pyproject.toml` | `**/*.py` | any | [python/pytest.md](python/pytest.md) |
| `ruff` | baseline | Lint + format (replaces flake8 + isort + black + bandit-partial) | `pyproject.toml` | `**/*.py` | any | [python/ruff.md](python/ruff.md) |
| `tach` | optional | Module-import boundary enforcement | `tach.toml` | `**/*.py` | any | [python/tach.md](python/tach.md) |
| `uv` | baseline | Fast Python package manager + venv + lockfile | `pyproject.toml`, `uv.lock` | `pyproject.toml`, `**/*.py` | any | [python/uv.md](python/uv.md) |

## node

| Tool | Tier | Summary | Targets | Detect | Platform | Page |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `biome` | baseline | JS/TS lint + format + import sort (replaces eslint + prettier) | `biome.json`, `package.json` | `package.json`, `**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx}` | any | [node/biome.md](node/biome.md) |
| `expo` | optional | Expo SDK conventions for React Native apps | `package.json`, `app.json`, `app.config.ts` | `app.json`, `app.config.ts`, `app.config.js` | any | [node/expo.md](node/expo.md) |
| `package-json` | baseline | Standard scripts + dependency pinning conventions | `package.json` | `package.json` | any | [node/package-json.md](node/package-json.md) |
| `typescript` | baseline | Strict tsconfig, noEmit type-checking | `tsconfig.json` | `tsconfig.json`, `**/*.{ts,tsx}` | any | [node/typescript.md](node/typescript.md) |

## monorepo

| Tool | Tier | Summary | Targets | Detect | Platform | Page |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `ci-paths` | optional | Path-filtered per-subproject CI workflows | `.github/workflows/` | ŌĆö | `github` | [monorepo/ci-paths.md](monorepo/ci-paths.md) |
| `docker-bake` | optional | Declarative multi-platform builds + skip-redundant-push CI | `docker-bake.hcl` | `**/Dockerfile*`, `docker-bake.hcl` | any | [monorepo/docker-bake.md](monorepo/docker-bake.md) |
| `layout` | optional | Polyglot monorepo directory shape + tooling boundaries | ŌĆö | ŌĆö | any | [monorepo/layout.md](monorepo/layout.md) |
| `makefile` | optional | Root Makefile orchestrator delegating to subprojects | `Makefile` | ŌĆö | any | [monorepo/makefile.md](monorepo/makefile.md) |
